title: Leashed Mob Tracker
description: A simple mod that highlights all currently leashed entities and displays their total count
body:
**Leashed Mob Tracker** is a lightweight client-side mod that highlights all currently leashed entities and shows their total count on screen.

🔍 Leashed mobs are visually outlined to help track them easily:
- The **closer** the mob is, the **greener** its outline
- The **further** it is, the **redder** the outline

You can configure features like _Transparency Level_, _Entity Counter_, and _Entity Outline_ by pressing "**M**" or using the Mod Menu

- ⚙️ This mod requires **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**, **[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)** and **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** to run
